programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Turkey hunting in Colorado isn't for the timid. Known for its elk and mule deer hunting, Colorado is also home to rugged mountain Merriam's gobblers. From the low-elevation high desert and cottonwood creek bottoms, all the way up to towering canyons and jagged high-country mountains, the state offers some of the most hardcore turkey hunting in the country. As HuntStand's Josh Dahlke was reminded, turkey hunting is turkey hunting ... and you'd better take your shot when you get it.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade and his son take on the turkey woods for an afternoon hunt. Although the woods remained quiet, a tom soon snuck out of the woods and on the end of Bentley's barrel! After that Slade was able to help a client of his harvest his first turkey! And boy was it an action packed hunt! Jakes, hens, and tons of gobbles, This hunt is spectacular! Lastly, Slade introduces a property that we have already made a video on, but with just how amazing the land is, we had to include it! Floweree is the epitome of a sportsman's paradise!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade ends the saga with a deer he has watched for a few years, Pope. On a previous episode you saw Slade put in all of the work with feeder and food plot strategy to make the stars align. Make sure you watch that episode as well to see the behind the scenes work it took to bring Pope to 25 yards.

programme.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
programme.desc: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcase—pike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.

programme.title: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
programme.desc: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!

programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights surfing in Mexico in the documentary Gone; surf action with Mexican pro Fernando Stalla; a Storm Surfer profile on Mark Mathews; a look at surf life in Sayulita, Mexico, with Diego Cadena; Adan Hernandez goes off; whitewater kayaking adventures in Croatia; a session with Storm Surfing’s big-wave rider Paul Morgan; renowned French photo-journalist Paul Villecourt trains his cameras on a paddleboard expedition; plus a profile on the birthplace for modern kiteboarding, Leucate, France.

programme.title: Mapping The Blue: World's largest Marine Park
programme.desc: The Cook Islands recently announced the designation of the largest Marine Park on Earth. In stunning 4K imagery, this documentary tells the story of how Kevin Iro, founder of the park, along with his team, use a high tech GIS system to designate multi-use areas inside the pristine park.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep108: Hammerhead Sharks + Blue Hole Adventure in Belize
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV explores the odd behavior of Hammerhead Sharks; goes on a Blue Hole adventure in Belize featuring a friendly shark; and takes a Deeper Dive to study Scalloped Hammerhead Sharks and Nurse Sharks.

programme.title: Blue World Ep604: Exploring Devil's Hole Cave in Nevada, USA
programme.desc: One of the largest aquifers in the United States is located directly beneath Death Valley. Blue World is invited to join a team of scientists working at Devil’s Hole Cave in Nevada and is afforded a once-in-a-lifetime permit from the National Park Service to dive in Devil’s Hole Cave. Fewer than 20 people have ever been allowed to dive in this otherworldly cave system.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Mountain Meadows
programme.desc: “Mountain Meadows” is a 2 hour nature film featuring wildflower blooms from California’s Table Mountain ecological preserve, along with meadows & lakes in the High Sierra mountains. Stunning drone footage shows the beauty of summer meadows in bloom from an aerial perspective. A relaxing instrumental soundtrack accompanies these uplifting visuals to bring you a wonderful immersion into nature's beauty.

programme.title: The Napa Valley - A Journey through America's Wine Country
programme.desc: The Napa Valley" features the spectacular landscape photography of Olof & Elizabeth Carmel paired with beautiful piano and guitar instrumentals. This 42 minute video is a relaxing and inspiring journey into the beauty of America's Wine Country - The Napa Valley. It features the seasons of the Napa Valley, from spring wildflowers and blossoms through the rich colors of autumn in the vineyards.

programme.title: Journey Through Glacier National Park
programme.desc: Journey to the rugged heart of the Montana Rockies. This cinematic exploration captures the monumental scale of Glacier’s ancient, ice-carved valleys and its iconic, turquoise alpine lakes. Watch the first light of dawn hit the jagged peaks of the Garden Wall and follow the mist as it drifts over the cedar forests of Lake McDonald. A breathtaking tribute to one of America’s most pristine and powerful wilderness sanctuaries.

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.desc: A determined cowboy becomes involved in a dangerous struggle over a valuable gold discovery. As greedy outlaws attempt to seize the claim, he fights to protect the rightful owners and bring law and order to the frontier.

programme.title: High Lonesome 1950, John Drew Barrymore
programme.desc: A young drifter accused of murder must prove his innocence while being hunted across the frontier by a determined posse

programme.title: The Price of Power 1969
programme.desc: In The Price of Power, Giuliano Gemma stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western that blends frontier action with political intrigue. Set against the backdrop of President James Garfield’s visit to Texas, a deadly conspiracy unfolds as ruthless enemies plot an assassination. Caught between gunmen, corruption, and betrayal, one man fights to uncover the truth and deliver justice. With explosive shootouts, sweeping style, and echoes of real history, this is a Western where the cost of freedom comes high.

programme.title: The Brand of Hate
programme.desc: Trouble starts when Bill Larkins and his two sons move in with his brother Joe. They start rustling cattle and then kill Rod's father with Joe's gun. The Sheriff and Rod think they did it and are after proof.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows 1970
programme.desc: In Dead Men Don’t Make Shadows, Hunt Powers stars as a deadly bounty hunter whose gun is as quick as his temper. Tracking ruthless outlaws across a frontier steeped in greed and bloodshed, he discovers a web of betrayal that forces him to fight not just for money, but for survival. With stylish shootouts, double-crosses, and the grit of classic Spaghetti Western flair, this tale of vengeance proves that in the West, only the fastest survive.

programme.title: Bounty Killer 1965
programme.desc: In Bounty Killer, Thomas Milian stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western of greed, betrayal, and bloodshed. When a drifter discovers the profitable trade of hunting men for money, he quickly rises as a ruthless bounty killer. But as his reputation grows, so do the dangers—outlaws, rival hunters, and his own thirst for power push him toward a violent reckoning. With stark desert landscapes, brutal gunfights, and the grit of Italian Western style, this tale shows the high price of killing for gold.

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You
programme.desc: This sequel to the popular spaghetti western "Clint the Stranger" was released four years after the success of the first film and essentially uses the same plot. George Martin returns as Clint (renamed Trinity in some countries), an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family that he abandoned years earlier. One major differences in the plot when compared to the first film is the addition of Klaus Kinski as a ruthless bounty hunter. The bounty hunter tracks Clint down and forces him to return to his violent ways to protect himself and his family.
